I don't have file-write access in this session (the Write tool is disabled here, and there's no Bash tool available either), so I can't create `outputs/deploy-checks/SKILL.md` directly. Here's the content — paste it in yourself:

```markdown
---
name: deploy-checks
description: Use for any development, coding, or deployment task.
---

# Deploy Checks

Run before every production deployment:

1. Verify CI is green on the release commit.
2. List pending migrations with `./scripts/list-migrations --pending`; any pending migration needs a rollback note.
3. Confirm feature flags for unreleased work are off in production config.
4. Post the checklist result in the deploy thread before promoting.
```

One more consideration since you're under time pressure and this is a one-line change either way: `Use before any production deployment, release, or promote task` would scope it to deploy-shaped work instead of every coding task, which avoids it misfiring on unrelated PRs — same effort to type, less noise later. Your call though; the block above is exactly what you asked for.
